title: Capital One (COF) Down on Q3 Earnings Miss as Provisions Rise
text: Rise in provisions and higher expenses hurt Capital One's (COF) Q3 earnings, while higher revenues on solid credit card business, robust loan demand and rising rates offer some support.

title: Capital One Financial Corporation (COF) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE:COF.PK ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call October 27, 2022 5:00 PM ET Company Participants Jeff Norris – Senior Vice President-Finance Richard Fairbank – Chairman and Chief Executive Officer Andrew Young – Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Kevin Barker – Piper Sandler Ryan Nash – Goldman Sachs Betsy Graseck – Morgan Stanley Sanjay Sakhrani – KBW Moshe Orenbuch – Credit Suisse Arren Cyganovich – Citi Don Fandetti – Wells Fargo Rick Shane – JPMorgan Bill Carcache – Wolfe Research Mihir Bhatia – Bank of America Dominick Gabriele – Oppenheimer Operator Good day, and thank you for standing by. Welcome to the Third Quarter 2022 Capital One Financial Earnings Conference Call.

title: Capital One (COF) Misses Q3 Earnings Estimates
text: Capital One (COF) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -16.50% and 2.36%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: NII, Fee Income to Support Capital One's (COF) Q3 Earnings
text: Higher NII and fee income, rising rates and solid consumer loan demand are expected to have supported Capital One's (COF) Q3 earnings, while a rise in expenses and provisions might have hurt.

title: What To Expect From Capital One Stock In Q3?
text: Stock price estimate is 46% higher than the current market price We arrive at Capital One's valuation, using an EPS estimate of around $20.70 and a P/E multiple of just below 7x in fiscal 2022.

title: Overblown Consumer Credit Fears Make Capital One A Conviction Buy
text: Capital One shares have been hard hit by fears a recession will greatly weaken consumer credit quality. While delinquencies are rising, they are doing so from temporarily low levels and remain at a healthy absolute level.

title: Seattle woman gets probation for massive 2019 Capital One hack
text: SEATTLE — A former Seattle tech worker convicted of several charges related to a massive hack of Capital One bank and other companies in 2019 was sentenced Tuesday to time served and five years of probation.

title: Capital One Financial Corporation to Webcast Conference Call on Third Quarter 2022 Earnings
text: MCLEAN, Va. , Oct. 5, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- On Thursday, October 27, 2022, at approximately 4:05 p.m.

title: Rivian taps Capital One exec Diane Lye as its first CIO
text: Rivian has hired Diane Lye as its first chief information officer, a position that the EV maker says is necessary to expand globally. Lye's hiring comes as Rivian consolidates its internal and external technology teams across its numerous departments, including manufacturing IT and customer-facing digital products.
